name: seldonframe
description: Official SeldonFrame MCP — full control over workspaces, blocks, soul, brain, domains, and billing directly from Claude Code

tools.name: create_workspace
tools.description: Create a new client workspace from description or URL

tools.name: list_workspaces
tools.description: List all client workspaces with status

tools.name: switch_workspace
tools.description: Switch to a specific client workspace

tools.name: generate_block
tools.description: Generate a new block from natural language

tools.name: install_block
tools.description: Install a block into current or specified workspace

tools.name: bulk_install_block
tools.description: Install same block to multiple clients with confirmation

tools.name: update_block
tools.description: Update or customize an existing block

tools.name: customize_soul
tools.description: Update branding, theme or soul rules

tools.name: query_brain
tools.description: Ask for Brain v2 insights with visual summary

tools.name: export_agent
tools.description: Export the current workspace as a portable .agent/ folder

tools.name: store_secret
tools.description: Open a secure masked flow to store a workspace-scoped API key

tools.name: list_secrets
tools.description: List connected secret metadata without exposing plaintext values

tools.name: rotate_secret
tools.description: Rotate or delete a workspace secret and trigger a fresh secure capture flow

tools.name: get_inline_preview
tools.description: Return a live preview link or rendered component for a block

tools.name: auto_validate_block
tools.description: Automatically generate and run tests for a generated block
